reviews.review_text: Long board competition runs for a full week at the end of March.  From 6:55am:  constant obnoxiously long blasts in the air horn between heats, and narration of EVERY maneuver over a frikkin loadspeaker. Check your booking dates - there is zero peace and quiet in the caravan park and on the public beach while they're being blasted with this absolute nonsense.
Everything perfect, good surf and a beautiful cafe in front of the beach.
Lovely spot, we will return
Best mall in Cairns

We’ve holidayed in Agnes for years and booked this trip 12 months in advance for a relaxing family getaway. Within just two hours of arriving and setting up, we were met with unnecessary aggression from the current manager over the position of our parked car. Despite apologising and moving the vehicle within a timely manner to an alternate spot, the tone was confrontational rather than courteous. Throughout our stay, our families were subjected to repeated hostility, false accusations of vandalism to park property, and an overall aggressive approach from management. What should have been a relaxing break felt more like being monitored in a detention centre.|Reviews indicate this was not an isolated incident with management behaviour and definitely not a welcoming environment for families. Until there is a change in management, I strongly recommend staying elsewhere in Agnes.|NRMA, I urge you to take this seriously—we have submitted a formal complaint for investigation.
Der Empfang war sehr nett und wir haben 2 Nächte hier verbracht. Man bezahlt hier natürlich für die Lage und das ist auch in Ordnung. Wie würden wieder kommen wenn wir in der Region sind!

Located on the waterfront of the Agnes main beach, even the furthest site from the beach is about a 100 metre walk.  From our site it was 50 metre walk to the main beach, which is a hidden gem.  Good, very well maintained facilities, and even a café on site.  Loved it, and hope to return

Awesome, friendly, and helpful staff. As usual I didn't book ahead, but as usual the NRMA park staff made us feel welcome and sorted us a site. Camp kitchen could use a bin and the lawns a mow. We had a wonderful 4 days in paradise, thank you. Highly recommended!
Great spot for a holiday in the van. Hard to get a booking but worth the wait.

This holiday park is located at the southern end of the stunning beach. There a lots of caravan sites to choose from but you should book as early as possible to get the one you want as the park is usually pretty well booked out.|The amenities are spotless and well maintained

Absolutely spectacular location. Right on the beach with a variety of beautiful accommodation options. Very relaxed atmosphere with plenty of leafy grass areas. Very pet friendly. Clean facilities and friendly staff. We will definitely be back.

We stayed in a spacious cabin sleeping 4. Amenities are fantastic and a well-organized caravan and campsite for families. Surprisingly quiet at night considering the families with children. A great spot to base oneself to explore the area.
Great spot. Such friendly book in person.
Great spot right on beach

Stayed again at this amazing place. This time stayed in an ocean view safari tent. Amazing views of the beach and waves and the smells of the cafe. Had a few issues with a leak in tent and tv reception cutting in and out. But all and all was amazing
Directory at the beach

Camping face à  l'océan super mais en ce qui concerne les commodités peut mieux faire. Les poubelles  ne sont pas assez nombreuses et les cuisines extérieures un peu cheap pas essuis de vaisselle pas de four, 2 plaques pr préparer. Peu d'ombre quant aux emplacements.  Mais bon ds l'ensemble ça  va.
Love the Beach Cafe

Great carivan park backing on to a beautiful beach..coffee shop on the park...just a short walk to the shops..and nice walks around the area.. and a short drive to 1770...beautiful beaches and lovely scenery...

A good spot close to the beach, a literal short walk.
We stayed on the back end of powered sites, although we didn't need a powered site but everything else was fully booked! It would have been nice to be considered to pay a discounted price as we weren't using the power or water at the sites, but it gave us a place to stay so it is fine!
Appears they were in process of doing up some cabins and closed off a big section, of which a camp kitchen was included and not accessible. It's a nice place with good facilities though, made for a good stop at Agnes/1770!

Best location of a camping ground anywhere, great atmosphere and you can go for a walk on the beach anytime you want. The mini glamping cabins are amazing, one of the comfiest beds i have slept on. Amazing service all round as well.

Location is great but the villa is a duplex and isn't very clean.  Bathroom was not clean and even had cobwebs behind the toilet.  Park is very cramped and noisy!!   Woodgate NRMA Park was fabulous which is why we chose an NRMA park.  Disappointing and Definitely won't be back.  Woodgate it is!

Absolutely fantastic location and great accommodation. We stayed in a Tree Tops Safari Tent (T1) which sleeps 5. I would recommend T5, 6, 7 or 8 as they are better located. Facilities within the tent and the park are great. They have a fully functioning BBQ on the balcony of the tent. I would highly recommend this park for many reasons but mainly the location. The cafe was absolutely fantastic as well.

Stuffed up our dates saying that those are the dates you agreed to, but the date we turned up was given to us about 6 mths prior,  we worked out that it was because we had 2 medium to small dogs (retired champion  show Dogs) so,  very poor service, they keep saying it was our fault.
Had the caravan it was easy to get in and out of to set up etc... cafe is great and location is the best right on the beach and into the surf 🏄‍♀️ 🌊
Rented a house which was walking distance to nearly everything
Awesome location, thank you 😊
On the beach, great Cafe friendly staff close to shops, restaurants and golf,  fishing and surfing

Great park in fantastic location, if you like a nice safe surf beach this is the place.
All the amenities are modern and clean 4 washing machines 2 dryers coin operated
Camp kitchen is ok could be updated brand new bbq went in today, kettles and toasters are supplied, but could do with some gas hobs overall recommend this place we had a powered camp site, I don’t think there is any unpowered sites though.
Right on the beach..fantastic..and the best Cafe..more chairs and tables as well now!

Advertise kitchenette in studio cabins but there are no cooking facilities other than a microwave. Also, floor tiles in shower slippery and no grab rails to assist the more frail legged person. Our cabin had a child height toilet which made it difficult to sit and arise without grab rail. The park is extremely beautiful with great beach access. Staff most pleasant and helpful.
A very nice stay. Close to the beach. Great surf.
Only down fall you have to book 12mths in  advance

We found the studio to be clean the bed was comfortable and the shower was amazing, then you get to the balcony and oh my what a view loved it and just a few steps and we were on the beach.he greeting upon check in was welcoming and when there was a power outage the communication via text was open and up to date, then when the power returned everywhere but our studio a quick call saw the manager arrive on site and all sorted in no time. Would definitely stay there again. Absolutely love this place

Loved our stay and the location of the park. The live music on a Saturday afternoon was a lovely touch. My issue is that the park is divided between the spring road sites and the original park. Guests staying at the spring road sites do not have access to the amenities in the original park as they are locked and it is a long walk back from the beach or cafe. The amenities in the new section are too small for the number of guests. Men’s amenities have access to 2 showers and 1 toilet. These are also for some reason left unlocked at all times unlike the other ones down the front. This meant running into a junkie at 3am in the toilets which was very confronting and scary. Also only having one washer made wait times long. Would absolutely stay again as the location is amazing and close to town and the park in general is kept very clean and tidy.

We stayed at the Surf Mist Beach house for 3 nights. The interior is nice, but it's the deck, the view and the location that are the winners. Loved meals on the deck with the ocean on our doorstep. Enjoyed relaxing on the sun loungers without getting sandy 😆. |The only downside was the glass door that leads to the deck didn't lock. The BBQ was also a bit tricky to light. We didn't have neighbours (there is a shared entrance with the other beach house - Ocean Breeze) which was an added bonus.

The check in process is a tad mismanaged, I  was told (by a resident) that you are supposed to receive an e-mail with the boom gate code before arrival, I didn't - I guess walk-ins have to fend for themselves. With no code you are left to park in the driveway - in the way of others. There wasn't much said during check-in as though staff were preoccupied.  There's a long walk from some parts of the park to the amenities.  Some landscaping of the grounds is needed.  Not the same standard as other NRMA parks.  Fairly close to most of the main businesses you'd need.
A lovely place  by the ocean booked out at the moment dog friendly helpful staff a very pleasant place to stay
Top place for carvana park close to all required facilities. Forgot to bring some stuff and found all that I needed only minutes away at good prices.
Nice spot. Appears always busy although had plenty of room on our site. Very happy with the stay.
